description: Battle character registry. Maps hero role to sprite animation set. All units use pre-rendered PNG frame sequences from the Dark Assassin animation pack (Spine 3.8 export). Role tinting is applied via CSS drop-shadow filters at runtime.

dark_assassin.notes: Spine 3.8 pre-rendered frames. Source: mmorpg/artss/DarkAssassinAnimations/Frames/. Free to use (CMU mocap license).

role_tints.SUP: drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(255,215,0,0.9)) sepia(0.3) hue-rotate(30deg) — gold glow

units._all: All units use dark_assassin sprite set. Role CSS class (role-atk / role-def / role-sup) applied to unit div at init time by setUnitSprite(). Bust portraits shown in turn-order bar and action panel only.

_removed.engine: DragonBones + Pixi — removed. No production rigs were ever shipped and Moho pipeline was abandoned.
_removed.replaced_by: Pre-rendered PNG frame animation — no external runtime dependency, works in any browser, zero build step.
